# ResultHandler

**Associated Type**

The type of the result handler which will be offered the results returned by a distributed function invocation called via [doc://com.apple.Swift/documentation/Distributed/DistributedActorSystem/executeDistributedTarget(on:target:invocationDecoder:handler:)].

## Declaration

```swift
associatedtype ResultHandler : DistributedTargetInvocationResultHandler
```
title: ResultHandler
